content.en:
"How is it possible, Ye Tian is also a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, and he has mastered many Extreme Creation Perfect Control Techniques, and his strength is not weak among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm! With his ontology and his will clone, how can he resist for a while! Why did he give up resisting?"

Mochen was dumbfounded.

This is not normal!

Ye Tian gave up resistance and was directly devoured by the nameless kun, isn't this tantamount to looking for death?

A half-step perfect controller of the promising Extreme Creation Realm directly gave up resistance, this is not normal!

Ye Tian was swallowed, which meant that there was no one to drag the nameless kun for them.

As a result, the Nameless Kun quickly locked on to the Lord of Dust and Corrosion.

Previously, they could use the Secret Treasure to instantly block the Unknown Kun's lock, but they could only use it once, and now there is no way to continue to block the Unknown Kun's perception.

Suddenly, they were locked in.

"Run!"

The Lord of Corrosion and Mo Chen immediately decided.

They couldn't defeat the Nameless Kun, and the last time the two joined forces, the Lord of Corrosion was severely injured and fled back to the seventh layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

And Mochen was even more miserable, he almost fell, but he didn't dare to stay in the Nine Rivers Void to sleep, and shuttled to another place, which he slept for countless years.

This time, Mochen awakens and finds the Lord of Corrosion once again to join forces.

I thought it would be foolproof this time, but I made a mistake.

However.

The speed of the Nameless Kun was too fast, and in an instant, it came to the front of the Lord of Dust and Corrosion, and directly cast its own Nameless Mist.

These nameless mists suddenly enveloped the surrounding territory, making it impossible for Mochen and the Lord of Corrosion to escape from this misty area.

Soon.

The fight has begun!

In an instant, Mo Chen was injured, he couldn't withstand the attack of the Nameless Kun at all, the gap between the two sides was too big.

The Lord of Corrosion was slightly better, but was also quickly injured.

When Mo Chen, the Lord of Corrosion and the Nameless Kun were fighting, Ye Tian was inside the body of the Nameless Kun.

It stands to reason that if the average perfect controller is not as strong as the Nameless Kun, once it enters the body of the Nameless Kun, it will be refined by the Nameless Kun.

At this moment, Ye Tian was in the Kunhai in the stomach of the Nameless Kun, in the Kunhai Sea, the acidic substances here could corrode everything, but Ye Tian always used the exemption of the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, the Immortal Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment, and other Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments to offset the damage, but even so, it couldn't be offset for long.

But since Ye Tian dared to take the initiative to let the nameless kun devour, he naturally had hope of saving his life.

Because, he copied the perfect grade ancestor of the nameless kun.

Perfect-level Ancestral Fu: Nameless Erasure

【Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment: Kun Body】

Perfection is the ancestor: all things swallowed

Perfect Ancestral Gift: Nameless Mist

The Nameless Kun has a total of these four perfect-level ancestral endowments, if all of them are copied and fused, Ye Tian will have these four perfect-level ancestral endowments, which is equivalent to a small nameless Kun, and will not be swallowed by the sea of Kun in the nameless Kun's body at that time.

Because of this, he was not afraid that he would be devoured by the Nameless Kun, so he was relieved to enter the Nameless Kun's body.

"Mochen, you dare to trick me, the benefits I got from you at the beginning should not exist! If you really cooperate with me, I will really help you, but you dare to cheat me!"

Ye Tian was annoyed.

But this time, Mochen was pitted instead of being pitted, maybe he was in a desperate situation now.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian is very tolerant of the fusion of the nameless Kun's four perfection-level ancestral endowments, among which the nameless erasure of this perfect-level ancestral endowment is terrifying, and the perfection-level ancestral endowment that can be used in conjunction with the devouring of all things, once the enemy is devoured, it will automatically cast the nameless erasure of this perfect-level ancestral endowment, and the traces of the enemy's existence can be erased, and there will no longer be traces of the other party between heaven and earth, unless it is an existence that is stronger than Ye Tian to remember his existence.

Therefore, countless cultivators are extremely afraid of the nameless kun, that is, they are afraid that their traces will be erased.

After Ye Tian refined these three perfection-level ancestral endowments, he was no longer afraid of Kunhai, and the Kun Body and the Swallowing of All Things could ignore Kunhai's corrosive ability, allowing him to stay here with peace of mind.

Of course.

If the Nameless Kun were to deal with him with all his might, he would still be in some danger, so he would have to get out of here.

......

"The clone of the will has fallen!"

Mo Chen was covered in scars, even if he was the perfect controller and recovered quickly, he couldn't bear it, and he was in a nameless fog, so he couldn't escape at all.

"You'll have to use that treasure to escape!"

Mo Chen urged a fragment on his body, and most of the will and strength in his body were swallowed up by this fragment.

Then, Mo Chen and this fragment forcibly broke through the nameless mist, and even broke through the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

And the Lord of Corruption also escaped from the eighth layer of the void at a terrible price, and if he didn't escape, he would have to fall and die.

Mo Chen didn't dare to stay, and fled directly from the Nine Rivers Void, and his body was extremely weak, as if he was going to sleep again.

"Damn, Ye Tian knew that he was going to die, so he deliberately committed suicide, just to trap me?"

Mo Chen thought in annoyance.

But in the next moment, his expression changed.

"No, how can I remember Ye Tian's existence?"

Mo Chen suddenly realized a problem, that is, Ye Tian was likely not to fall.

Therefore, once it is devoured and fallen by the nameless kun, all traces of that person's existence will be erased, and this nameless kun is extremely powerful, even more powerful than him.

If Ye Tian was devoured by this nameless kun, there would no longer be Ye Tian in his memory.

But now, he still remembers Ye Tian, which means that Ye Tian is still alive.

Not long after he left the Nine Rivers Void, a figure stopped him.

Seeing this person, Mo Chen's expression changed drastically.

"Ye Tian, you're not dead?"

Mo Chen said in fear.

At this moment, he has already been hit hard, where is he still Ye Tian's opponent!

If Ye Tian wanted to kill him, he would have no way to resist at all!

"Ye Tian, it's not me who cheated you, I didn't know that the eighth layer of the Nine Rivers Void would be so terrifying, it was the Lord of Corrosion who deceived me!"

Mochen still wanted to explain, but Ye Tian wouldn't believe his nonsense.

"Mochen, you shouldn't be dead!"

Ye Tian made a move, and directly cast the nameless mist.

The nameless fog shrouded in a nameless fog, directly cutting off Mochen's hope of escaping.

"Nameless Mist ????"

Mochen was stunned, isn't this the ability of the nameless kun?

In the next moment, Ye Tian's Creation Extreme Ten Thousand Dao Blade broke through his body, and severely injured him who was dying, and he was almost on the verge of death.

Then, one after another Extremely Perfect Control Techniques beckoned Mo Chen, and in an instant, Mo Chen was killed by Ye Tian.

After Mo Chen's death, Ye Tian took away the treasure on Mo Chen's body.

"Hey, what is this?" Ye Tian sensed a special fragment, and this fragment actually had the aura of a high-grade perfect treasure remaining on it!
